# ThePeptideAI — Full Documentation
> AI-powered command center for peptide businesses

## Overview
ThePeptideAI is a comprehensive SaaS platform purpose-built for peptide businesses. It combines AI-powered research tools with full business operations — inventory management, order fulfillment, client management, sales tracking, payment processing, and an AI assistant that builds new features on demand.

## Core Features

### AI Assistant
- RAG-based search across peptide research literature
- Intelligent recommendations for researchers
- Natural language queries about peptides, protocols, and inventory
- AI-powered feature generation — describe what you need and it builds it

### Inventory Management
- Full peptide inventory tracking (peptides, lots, bottles)
- Movement tracking and stock level monitoring
- Barcode/QR scanning for rapid inventory operations
- Batch management and expiration tracking

### Order & Fulfillment
- End-to-end order management (create, process, fulfill, ship)
- Fulfillment center with pick/pack/ship workflow
- Payment processing with Stripe integration
- Public payment links for client invoicing

### CRM & Client Management
- Contact management with detailed profiles
- Client portal with dashboard, regimen tracking, and messaging
- Health tracking (macros, body composition)
- Community forum for client engagement

### Sales & Commissions
- Sales rep management and assignment
- Commission tracking and reporting
- Partner/affiliate program with dedicated stores
- Referral system with trackable links

### Protocols
- Protocol builder for peptide regimens
- Client-facing regimen views
- Research-backed protocol templates

### Multi-Tenant Platform
- Vendor (super-admin) layer for managing multiple tenants
- Per-tenant configuration, billing, and analytics
- Subdomain-based tenant isolation
- White-label capabilities

### Integrations
- Supabase backend with edge functions
- Stripe payment processing
- WooCommerce plugin for existing stores
- Custom entity engine for user-defined data models
- Custom report builder

## Technical Stack
- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite
- UI: Radix UI + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
- State: TanStack React Query
- Backend: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Edge Functions + Auth)
- Payments: Stripe
- Monitoring: Sentry
- Hosting: Vercel

## Public Pages
- / — Main dashboard (authenticated)
- /#/crm — CRM landing page (public)
- /#/get-started — Onboarding flow (public)
- /#/auth — Authentication (public)
- /#/join — Sign up (public)
- /#/status — System status (public)
- /#/privacy — Privacy policy (public)
- /#/terms — Terms of service (public)

## API Endpoints
The platform exposes Supabase edge functions for:
- Peptide research queries (RAG search)
- Inventory CRUD operations
- Order management
- Payment processing
- Client portal data
- Boot failure reporting and auto-healing

## Contact
- Support: support@thepeptideai.com
- Website: https://thepeptideai.com
